title: that 名詞子句（主詞 / 受詞）

formulas.formula: It is + adj./p.p. + that + S + V
formulas.zh: 虛主詞 It 開頭，將 that 名詞子句作真正主詞後移
that 名詞子句作動詞的受詞（that 可省略）

explanation: that 引導的名詞子句可用虛主詞 It 將其後移至句末，使句子結構更平衡。當 that 子句作主詞時，that 不可省略；當作受詞時，that 可省略但常保留以增加清晰度。此句型強調主詞的重要性或客觀事實，常見於正式書寫或強調型表達中。注意 It 為虛主詞，真正主詞是 that 之後的子句。

examples.eng: It is important that students study hard for the exam.
examples.chi: 學生為考試認真唸書是很重要的。

examples.eng: She believes that climate change will affect our future.
examples.chi: 她相信氣候變遷將會影響我們的未來。

examples.eng: It is surprising that he passed the difficult test.
examples.chi: 他通過了這項困難的測驗是很令人驚訝的。

examples.eng: The teacher expects that all students will finish the homework on time.
examples.chi: 老師期望所有學生都會準時完成作業。

extension.tip: 判斷 that 何時可省：作主詞（虛主詞句型）時 that 不可省；作受詞時通常可省但保留更佳。注意虛主詞 It 只在主詞子句時使用，不能用於受詞子句。混淆點：不要將 that 子句與 because 或 why 子句混淆。

examples.test: ✓ It is true that he won the prize. / ✗ It is true he won the prize.
examples.result: → 虛主詞句型中 that 不可省略

examples.test: ✓ I think (that) he is honest. / ✓ I think he is honest.
examples.result: → 受詞子句中 that 可省，兩者皆正確

examples.test: ✗ It is important he studies hard. / ✓ It is important that he studies hard.
examples.result: → 需要 that 連接詞以標示從句

extension.note: 虛主詞句型記憶法：「It is + 形容詞 + that」該 that 必留，「S + V + that」該 that 可留可不留。

parts: young people should have equal opportunities in education.
exercises.sentence: It is clear that young people should have equal opportunities in education.
exercises.translation: 年輕人應該有平等的教育機會是很清楚的。

exercises.sentence: The research suggests (that) the new medicine is effective.
exercises.translation: 該研究暗示這種新藥是有效的。

parts: all employees follow the company safety rules.
exercises.sentence: It is required that all employees follow the company safety rules.
exercises.translation: 所有員工遵守公司安全規則是被要求的。

parts: technology has changed our daily lives significantly.
exercises.sentence: Many people believe (that) technology has changed our daily lives significantly.
exercises.translation: 許多人相信科技已經大幅改變了我們的日常生活。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇最適合的選項完成句子，使用 that 名詞子句。
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ that he passed the difficult exam surprised everyone in the class.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A。『It is + adj. + that 子句』為虛主詞句型，It 為虛主詞，真正的主詞是 that 後面的子句。B 項『That is』改變了句意；C 項『What is』為關係代名詞，文法錯誤；D 項『This is』為指示詞，不符合此句型結構。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的選項完成句子，強調重要事實。
mc_exercises.question_eng: It is essential _______ all employees understand the new company policy before next month.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B。『It is + adj. + that + S + V』句型中，that 為名詞子句的連接詞，不可省略。A 項『when』為時間副詞；C 項『which』為關係代名詞，後需有逗號；D 項『where』為地點副詞，都不符合此句型。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇適當的連接詞完成句子，區別主詞和受詞子句用法。
mc_exercises.question_eng: The scientist announced _______ her team had discovered a new species, and it was remarkable _______ nobody had identified it before.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A。第一個空為受詞子句『announced that...』，that 可省略但常保留；第二個空為『It is + adj. + that + S + V』主詞子句，that 不可省略。B 項『which』為關係代名詞，第二空錯誤；C 項第二空『which』不符合主詞子句結構；D 項『what』為關係代名詞，第一空文法錯誤。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 判斷最複雜的句型應用，需理解虛主詞與真正主詞的關係。
mc_exercises.question_eng: It is undeniable _______ the pandemic has significantly impacted global economy, yet some argue _______ technological innovation will eventually offset these losses, which is debatable _______.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A。第一空為『It is + adj. + that + S + V』主詞子句，that 必用；第二空為『argue that...』受詞子句，該用 that；第三空為『is debatable that...』的省略形式，亦應用 that。B 項第二、三空錯誤；C 項『what』為關係代名詞，文法不符；D 項『whether』表選擇性，第二空應為 that 敘述性，第三空亦應為 that。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 學生準時交作業是很重要的。
translation_exercises.answer: It is important that students submit their assignments on time.
key_points: 虛主詞 It，真主詞是 that 子句
hints: 提示1：使用『It is + 形容詞 + that + S + V』的句型結構
提示2：虛主詞 It 後面要直接接形容詞（important），不能接名詞

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 老師很清楚學生們已經掌握了這個文法概念。
translation_exercises.answer: It is clear to the teacher that students have grasped the grammar concept.
key_points: It is + adj. + to + sb. + that
hints: 提示1：『It is + 形容詞 + to sb. + that + S + V』可用來表達對某人而言很明顯/清楚的事
提示2：注意主詞子句內的時態搭配，『已經掌握』用現在完成式

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 令人遺憾的是，許多高中生沒有意識到社群媒體對他們心理健康的負面影響。
translation_exercises.answer: It is regrettable that many high school students are not aware of the negative impact of social media on their mental health.
key_points: are not aware of 的表達
hints: 提示1：『regrettable（令人遺憾的）』為形容詞，置於『It is』之後；也可用『It is a pity that』替代
提示2：『意識到』用『be aware of』表達；『負面影響』為『negative impact on』

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 大多數人不會否認氣候變遷已經對全球環境造成了嚴重威脅這一事實。
translation_exercises.answer: It is undeniable that climate change has posed a serious threat to the global environment.
key_points: pose a threat to + 名詞
hints: 提示1：『不會否認...事實』可轉換為『不可否認...』，使用『It is undeniable that』；p.p. 包括 undeniable、feared、hoped 等
提示2：『造成威脅』用『pose a threat to』；『已經造成』用現在完成式『has posed』，注意時態一致
